summary: Plan-only classification for the live PR inventory shard. #90202 is a useful but broad memory-wiki feature PR and is not merge-ready without maintainer review and a complete merge preflight. Security-sensitive linked refs are routed only at their exact items.

Closed security-sensitive PR remains read-only historical context and should not be handled by Clownfish remediation automation.

This PR is related but not a merge candidate in this cluster because its review loop is still active and unresolved.

The PR looks substantive and potentially useful, but the code delta is broad, independent review proof is missing, and the check set contains failures; maintainer judgment is required before merge or repair planning.
